title: Dual port RAM doesn't infer a DP16KD on ECP5 if both ports are on the same clock

features.name: dual_port_ram_same_clock_both_ports
features.description: Code should include a dual-port RAM implementation where both ports use the same clock signal in separate procedural blocks

features.name: ecp5_synth_with_dual_port_ram
features.description: Code should include an ECP5 synthesis attribute applied to a module containing a dual-port RAM
features.snippet: (* tech_ecp5 = 1 *) module top(input clk, ...); reg [7:0] ram[63:0]; ... endmodule
